observation: Record of mandatory Health & Safety Training imparted to workers under Section 111 A (ii) of The Factories Act, 1948 was not evident.
recommendation: Under Section 111 A (ii) of The Factories Act, 1948, Mandatory Health and safety training on various topics viz; Accident prevention techniques, MSDS, Machine safety, Work permit system, Fire prevention & firefighting, Emergency plan etc. shall be imparted to workers by DISH approved training institute.

observation: Environment, Health & Safety Policy was available and displayed in English only.
recommendation: As per rule 68-O of the Gujarat Factories Rules, 1963 Policy should be made available in local language and displayed it at conspicuous places.

observation: First aid box available across the factory but copy of FIRST-AID LEAFLET (Situations- Procedures) issued by the Directorate general of Factories Advice Service and labour Institutes, Government of India, Mumbai was not evident in all First Aid Boxes.
recommendation: As per the Rule 70 (C) (xxiii) of the GFR, 1963, one Copy of first aid leaflet issued by the Directorate general of Factories Advice Service and labour Institutes, Government of India, Mumbai shall be kept in each first aid box.

observation: Confined space entry (to enter any chamber, tank, vat, pit, pipe, flue, and reactor) was done by without competent person authorization.
recommendation: As per Section 36 of The Factories Act, 1948, any confined space entry shall be done by taken certificate from competent person approved by DISH [Directorate of Industrial safety & Health].

observation: Display of the confined space on all the manhole covers inside the plant was not evident.
recommendation: As per Rule 102, Schedule 19, Part II, Para (18) (1) (a) of The Gujarat Factories Rules, 1963, Confined pace entry to be identified and to be displayed. To be mentioned suitably for all the manholes of various equipment in the plant

observation: Visitor safety induction film was not available.
recommendation: Visitor safety induction film to be made available near security gate.

observation: Colour coding system for pipeline (utilities and chemicals) was not available.
recommendation: Colour coding system for pipeline should be maintained as per IS 2379 & colour code to be displayed the board in the plant.

observation: Cautionary Notice for Acids & Alkalis near HCl storage and handling area was missing.
recommendation: Precautionary notice as per Paragraph 6 of Schedule XII (Manipulation of Acids or Alkalis) under Rule 102 The Gujarat Factories Rules, 1963;

observation: SOP/Do's & Don'ts not displayed at all operation areas and Chemical storage area.
recommendation: SOP/Do's & Don'ts to be displayed at all operation areas and Chemical storage area.

observation: Record of undertaking taken from workers for giving training on cautionary notice and instruction not evident.
recommendation: As per the Para – 4 of Part – II of Schedule XIX under Rule 102 of The Gujarat Factories Rules, 1963 An undertaking from the workers shall be obtained within 1 month of their employment and for old workers employed within one month of coming in to operation of these rules, to the effect that they have read the contents of the cautionary notices and instruments, understood by them and would abide by them.

observation: MOC (Management of change) Procedure was not evident for all changes/ process.
recommendation: MOC (Management of Change) Procedure should be established/reviewed, implemented and record to be maintained.

observation: Work place monitoring records was not evident.
recommendation: Work place monitoring to be carried out at regular interval and records to be maintained in form-37.

observation: Over all housekeeping and illumination was not to the required level for smooth movement for safe operation.
recommendation: It is recommending for improving housekeeping of operation all area, as this is the first cause for any incident. Different level of illumination (lux level) is required as per the activity. Plan for illumination survey as per the standard by a competent vendor and if, less than standard lux level provide additional light fitting.

observation: Piping color-coding chart display found in operational area but not followed as most of the pipelines colour was peeled off.
recommendation: After rectification of pipelines, repainting pipeline as per piping colour code to avoid mal charging or isolation chemical

observation: Flow direction arrows marking not found for all pipelines.
recommendation: Mark flow direction arrow on all pipelines after repaints of pipelines, which will help for quick and correct opening or closing of valve during emergency.

observation: Hazard area classification display not found in that area.
recommendation: Plan for hazard area classification & display zone name in operational area.

observation: HDPE and PPRC pipeline used for transferring chemical and utilities but they were bend & hanging as they were not supported properly. This may lead leaks and incident.
recommendation: Consult HDPE / PPRC pipe supplier and provide support as per their guideline.

observation: Only 04 windsocks provided in complex and not visible from all locations & may misguide for escape during emergency.
recommendation: Make survey that windsock is visible from all locations. If short fall, plan to fix new windsocks at an appropriate location.

observation: Plant was of wide area with high working staff strength, but emergency escape route with arrows & symbols were not found / very less in operation area.
recommendation: Paint or fix sticker for Emergency escape route with arrow & symbols in fluorescent light, which can be easily seen during power failure and from a working area. It is also advisable to provide at junction where there are more than one way.

observation: a) Reactor agitator and pump coupling covered with guard but most of them was not as per the standard, which are in hose made with wide opening, loose / not rigid, not covering all rotating parts and not of proper MOC proper MOC (Few agitator coupling covered with polymer net).

Nitrogen line provided to reactor / tank for purging / blanketing / material transferring but there was no NRV in nitrogen line considering nitrogen pressure was more than reactor / tank. Possibility to pass of tank vapor to nitrogen header if valve was passing / not close properly and drop in nitrogen header pressure at the same time.
recommendation: It is recommended to provide NRV in nitrogen line near each reactor / tank.

observation: Reactor floor had opening on floor and having trip and fall hazard.
recommendation: Cover opening by grating or provide sufficient height toe guard at tank periphery.

observation: Instrument Y tree header drain and unused tapings were isolated by closing valve but not plugged. Anyone can open this valve for any general-purpose use, drop in IA pressure & results unwanted operation of pneumatic control valve.
recommendation: Plug instrument Y tree drain & unused tapings on above closing of valve.

observation: Pipelines without piping colour code, without flow direction arrow &
recommendation: It needs for painting all pipelines as per colour code, mark flow direction and provide support to HDPE lines. HDPE pipes without proper supports.

observation: Fire extinguishers not at marked location of FE/07, 10, 14 &...
recommendation: Put FE form stand by stock before old FE.

observation: R-111 had no agitator coupling guard
recommendation: Provide coupling gaud as per standard.

observation: Ground floor had very low illumination.
recommendation: Plan for illumination survey.

observation: R-202 (SS) Hexane handling line had no bonding / flange jump and free flow charging from top of the reactor. There will be accumulation of generated static charge
recommendation: Provide bonding on Hexane pipe line and charge in reactor with J type pipe.

observation: Sodium cyanide handling area display with Do and Don't but MSDS extract with pictorial use of PPWE not displayed. On line breathing set use while charging NaCN handling but it was dirty, no pressure gauge and moisture / dust filter and no guide line for use of online BA set.
recommendation: Display pictorial view for use of on line BA set and required PPE. Keep the safety items in ready to use condition all the time.

observation: Marking not done for emergency light, so it was difficult to judge whether it was normal light or emergency light and if not getting on during normal power failure, people may assume this was normal light fitting.
recommendation: Tag emergency light by fixing sticker as “Emergency Light” or paint red colour on fitting.

observation: Hand rail was missing on all turning platform of staircase and had sufficient gap for fall hazard for man and material.
recommendation: Rectify hand rail and steps for protection of fall hazard.

observation: Cooling water main supply and return line highly corroded
recommendation: Plan for painting of pipelines.

observation: R-304 reactor piping flanged corroded and no agitator coupling guard.
recommendation: Rectify the pipeline and provide coupling guard

observation: Nitrogen line provided in R-314 but no NRV in nitrogen line.
recommendation: Provide NRV in nitrogen line.

observation: Bromine handled in glass pot and pipes but there was no protection of them from impact load, result damages and spillage of highly toxic chemical.
recommendation: Plan for protection of glass vessel / pipeline or restrict un authorised movement and display instruction / guide line for working in this area.

observation: Acid and caustic handled in this area but safety shower had no any cautionary notice.
recommendation: Display notice as below near safety shower.

observation: PPE matrix displayed in plant but awareness of PPE matrix and use of PPE was not to the required level.
recommendation: Need training to working staff and instruct to use required PPE as per matrix before start of a particular job.

observation: PESO license displayed but it was showing license number and its validity date.
recommendation: Display license with full details mentioning number of tonner.

observation: Chlorine detector provided at more than 1.5 meter height from floor level in chorine gas cylinder area, this may not detect at small leak or may take time or detect at heavy leakage, as chorine is heavier than air.
recommendation: Provide chlorine detector at lower height for better performance. (Refer chorine detector supplier guideline for installation / exact height from floor level).

observation: Chlorine toner handling EOT: EOT details not displaced in nearby area.
recommendation: This is statutory for EOT chain blocks to display equipment number, SWL, Tested date & Next test due date on EOT or at a nearby visible location.

observation: Filled tonner kept with very small size stopper, may has possibility for roll out.
recommendation: Use only standard size stopper like wheel choke for storing / stacking of filled and empty tonners.

observation: Empty tonners were stacked with both valve cap but without fixing valve protecting hood, which require to protect valve from damage during transport and internal handling as empty toner still had some balance chlorine & this may leak due to damage.
recommendation: It is recommended to Fix valve protection hood before lifting out empty tonner from its position.

observation: Bromine bullet tank top platform had wide opening, this having trip and fall hazard.
recommendation: Cover opening by grating or plate or provide sufficient height toe guard at bullet periphery.

observation: Unused pipeline tapping on standby bullet isolated by closing valve but not blinded so, possibility for bromine leak.
recommendation: Isolation of unused branch tapping by simple closing of valve is not reliable in highly toxic and flammable material handling system. Valve is supposed to pass due to frequent operation or not closed properly. All to be blinded or Plugged with a competent MOC and specified rating.

observation: R-502 MSGL solvent / Chemical charging line had no bonding and free flow from top in reactor.
recommendation: Provide bonding in solvent lines and extend solvent line dip at bottom and confirm that reactor had

observation: R-504 toluene transfer line had no boding
recommendation: Provide bonding.

observation: R-504 and other reactor agitator coupling had of poly net guard.
recommendation: Provide coupling guard as per guideline.

observation: R-519 reactor and nearby pipelines insulation was provided but cladding not fixed, so water /chemical may ingress in between insulation and pipe outside, accumulated water deteriorate insulation quality and leads metal corrosion called as corrosion under insulation (CUI).
recommendation: Rectify damaged cladding and provide at missing locations & make practice to apply cladding just on completion of insulation.

observation: There was no MCP, Fire Call point and escape route arrow.
recommendation: It needs to review for providing MCP, Fire Call point and escape route arrow at an appropriate locations.

observation: Heavy storage of scrap at entrance area and reduce plant looks
recommendation: Needs shift scarp at a designated location.

observation: Near R-616 steam line without insulation which had human burn injury.
recommendation: Provide insulation on line or if not feasible plan for personal protection which requires, where surface temperature is more than 50 degree centigrade.

observation: Fire extinguisher blocked by chemical filled open drums, so difficult to access FE and fume was coming out from open drums. This may be fire and health hazard.
recommendation: Keep the firefighting and safety items approach without any obstruction and close the open chemical drums.

observation: Low illumination at ground floor.
recommendation: Plan for illumination survey.

observation: Fire Flow Head Start Pr. Stop Pr. Pump M³/Hr Meter Kg/Cm² Kg/Cm²
a) Main electrical fire water pump had common canopy for motor and coupling, but coupling not covered fully.
Fencing height was less than 1.8 meter.
recommendation: Fencing height to be 1.8 meter.

observation: Display of “Unauthorized entry Restricted” & “List of authorized persons” not found.
recommendation: Display board for “Unauthorized Entry Restricted.” & “List of authorized persons” at entrance.

observation: Opening in wall for cables not sealed and without fire retardant paint, so fire may travel to other room / portion if occur in any one side due to short circuit or over load in cable.
recommendation: Seal cable entry & exit wall opening, and apply fire retardant paint on cable approximate for one meter on both sides, so cable fire can be stopped to go in next nearby compartment.

observation: MCC room housekeeping was no to the required level.
recommendation: Remove unwanted material and improve housekeeping.

observation: Display of “Unauthorized entry Restricted” & “List of authorized persons” not found.
recommendation: Display board for “Unauthorized Entry Restricted.” & “List of authorized persons” at entrance.

observation: PCC room had HVAC & Exhaust fan still room was hot, Cooling to panel done by 04 number of portable pedestals.
recommendation: It needs to study the ventilation system capacity and performance of exhaust fan capacity and number.

observation: Pedestal fans were without additional fine screens on fan blade guard, this had human finger injury.
recommendation: Make study to replace pedestal fan by high-capacity exhaust fan for room cooling, if not feasible, provide fine screen on blade guard and protect from finger injury.

observation: Emergency gate provided but exit arrow not found.
recommendation: Mark arrow showing direction of emergency exit.

observation: First floor staircase had damaged step & railing this had fall hazard.
recommendation: Rectify the staircase step and hand railing.

observation: There was no evidence for use of wheel chokes while parking of tanker for loading / unloading in all loading / unloading points. In some cases, front portion of tanker lifted / kept on stand while tanker unloading to empty out tanker fully, and parked by using hand brake. Tanker goes back if hand break failed. This result-unwanted movement of tanker, detach of loading / unloading hose and spillage of chemicals.
recommendation: It is recommended for using minimum two wheels chokes in opposite directions while doing tanker loading or unloading activity.

observation: At few tank farm, tanker activity done on road and may obstruct / restrict movement emergency vehicles like fire tender and ambulance.
recommendation: Survey Tank farm tanker activity, mark area for tanker location for loading / unloading activity, keeping clear path for movement of emergency vehicle like fire tender and ambulance.

observation: IB tank top platform had wide opening, this have trip and fall hazard.
recommendation: Cover opening by grating or plate or provide sufficient height toe guard at tank periphery.

observation: A tank detail was not available as painting was going on.
recommendation: Display following details on each tank: Tank number, Name of chemical or material code, Maximum storing capacity & NFPA diagram at such a location, height, letter size, so which can be readable from a road.

observation: Dike drain valve found open, this defeats purpose of dike.
recommendation: Drain valve to be kept closed all the time except draining for rainy water.

observation: Tanks were in different dike but few dike walls punctured to take pipes from one dike to other. Possibility of inter mixing of chemicals which may not be compatible.
recommendation: Seal opening in tank dike wall.

observation: FG loaded in truck from elevated platform at entrance, but this open space had fall hazard if there was parked vehicle.
recommendation: Plan for detachable barricading / hand rail which to be fixed when there was no loading activity.

observation: Fork lift (FL) Driver was not wearing seat belt.
recommendation: It is recommending to Develop fork lift check list and to be filled daily before start of FL for healthiness, if any point not comply, concession to be taken from concerned authority.

observation: There was no identified inspection zone to test incoming material, possibility to issue of un tested material to user.
recommendation: Identify area, mark and display as material under inspection. Shift the material to relevant approved or rejected material area as per test report.

observation: VC-2: CaCl_{2} circulations pump without coupling guard.
recommendation: Provide guard on coupling.

observation: Nitrogen PSA: Huge amount of nitrogen handled in PSA plant. People were not fully aware for Nitrogen hazard and precaution to be taken while handling / leak of nitrogen.
recommendation: It is recommended to give training to working staff for nitrogen handling, display nitrogen Do & Don't guideline. Asphyxia hazard warning signage and MSDS main critical / few important parameters with main hazard, symbolic use of relevant PPE & NFPA diagram in such a language, so maximum staff can understand.

observation: Cooling water: Approach is difficult due to water logging and stored scrap near CW pumps and both CW pump were without coupling guard.
recommendation: It needs corrective action on regular basis. Provide guard on CW pump coupling.

observation: Chemical MSDS hard copy kept in laboratory but there was no display of chemical comparability chart which were used in laboratory.
recommendation: It is recommended to study chemical compatibility for all chemicals stored in laboratory, prepare chart, display & follow the same for storing of chemicals.

observation: Fuming chamber performance was poor as its front door not closing properly, hole in fuming chamber and without connection of exhaust blower, so all fume in working area.
recommendation: Rectify the fuming chamber or plan for new one with all features.

observation: Housekeeping was found poor.
recommendation: Housekeeping needs improvement.

observation: Illumination was found poor in hazardous waste storage area.
recommendation: Illumination study to be carried out and accordingly illumination to be improved.

observation: Near MEE area, water logging observed and also floor was slippery.
recommendation: To be reviewed.
